title: Integrated leakproof cup cover for direct drinking and drinking with straw and cup having same
abstract: The present invention discloses an integrated leakproof cup cover for direct drinking and drinking with a straw and a cup having the same. The cup cover comprises a cup cover body and a slider body, and the bottom wall of the cup cover body is provided with a central through hole and a drinking port; the bottom of the cup cover body is provided with a clamping part, and the outer side wall of the clamping part is provided with a thread; the slider body comprises a connecting column and a sliding push piece; the connecting column is rotationally connected in the central through hole, and the sliding push piece is sleeved and fixed on the connecting column and fitted to the top surface of the cup cover body and can be rotated on the top surface of the cup cover body with the connecting column as the center.
claims: 1. An integrated leakproof cup cover for direct drinking and drinking with a straw, comprising: a cup cover body ( 1 ), wherein the cup cover body ( 1 ) has a tubular structure with an opening at a top and a closed bottom, and a bottom wall is provided with a central through hole ( 2 ) and a drinking port ( 3 ) located on one side of the central through hole ( 2 ); and the bottom of the cup cover body ( 1 ) is provided with a clamping part ( 4 ) extending downwards, and the outer side wall of the clamping part ( 4 ) is provided with a thread; a slider body ( 5 ), wherein the slider body ( 5 ) comprises a connecting column ( 51 ) and a sliding push piece ( 52 ); and the connecting column ( 51 ) is rotationally connected in the central through hole ( 2 ), and the sliding push piece ( 52 ) is sleeved and fixed on the connecting column ( 51 ) and fitted to the top surface of the cup cover body ( 1 ) and can be rotated on the top surface of the cup cover body ( 1 ) with the connecting column ( 51 ) as the center to realize the opening and sealing of the drinking port ( 3 ).
